backend/routers/analyze.py::_get_or_buil.name: _get_or_build_graph
backend/routers/analyze.py::_get_or_buil.docstring: Get cached graph or build a new one. Returns (graph, project_files).

backend/routers/analyze.py::analyze_grap.name: analyze_graph
backend/routers/analyze.py::analyze_grap.docstring:
Return the complete call graph built from AST analysis.

    Response includes:
    - modules: module-level dependency graph
    - definitions: all function/class/method definitions with exact line nu...

backend/routers/analyze.py::_build_flow_.name: _build_flow_data
backend/routers/analyze.py::_build_flow_.docstring:
Convert call graph to React Flow-compatible nodes & edges.

    Layer 1 (module level): each file is a node, import = edge
    Layer 2 (function level): each function is a node, call = edge

backend/routers/analyze.py::AnnotateRequ.name: AnnotateRequest
backend/routers/analyze.py::AnnotateRequ.docstring: Optional filter: only annotate specific modules.

backend/routers/analyze.py::analyze_anno.name: analyze_annotate
backend/routers/analyze.py::analyze_anno.docstring:
Ask LLM to annotate call graph nodes with Chinese labels.

    LLM receives only signatures + call relationships (no full code).
    Falls back gracefully: returns raw function names if LLM fails.

backend/routers/analyze.py::analyze_deta.name: analyze_detail
backend/routers/analyze.py::analyze_deta.docstring:
Expand a function's internal logic into a flowchart.

    This is the only endpoint that sends actual source code to LLM,
    but only for ONE specific function (not the entire project).

backend/services/call_graph.py::_build_i.name: _build_import_name_map
backend/services/call_graph.py::_build_i.docstring:
Build a mapping: imported_name -> qualified_name in project.

    E.g. if file does `from backend.services.llm import call_qwen`,
    maps "call_qwen" -> "backend/services/llm.py::call_qwen".

backend/services/call_graph.py::_resolve.name: _resolve_call_edges
backend/services/call_graph.py::_resolve.docstring: Resolve callee_name to callee_resolved (qualified_name) where possible.

Build a complete call graph from project source files.

    Returns a CallGraph with:
    - definitions: all function/class/method definitions
    - edges: all call relationships with resolved targets...
